name: Career Counselling

overview: Guide students through the exact decision this app helps with. Career Counselling sits in the Guidance & Development family of Education & Training. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.

who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality

Keep improving at pathway knowledge — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them

problem_solving_style: People-centred — listen, mediate, guide and align humans

faqs: What does Career Counselling pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹4 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹12 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Psychology, Any. Typical degrees: B.A./M.A. Psychology, Career counselling certification. Alternatives exist: any degree + b.ed.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Career Counselling evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Career Counselling is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
